name: a2amesh-workspace
author: oaslananka
description: A2A Mesh TypeScript infrastructure for A2A-native agent systems.

scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:code && pnpm run lint:md && pnpm run lint:yaml && pnpm run lint:identity
scripts.lint:identity: node scripts/check-package-names.mjs && node scripts/check-identity.mjs && node scripts/check-forbidden-refs.mjs && node scripts/check-no-generated-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/check-no-secrets.mjs && node scripts/check-issue-template-packages.mjs && node scripts/check-runtime-versions.mjs && node scripts/check-labels.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.test.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/demo/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/registry-ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run build && vitest run --project unit
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build && vitest run --project integration --project transport-contract && pnpm run examples:smoke
scripts.test:conformance: pnpm run build && vitest run --project conformance
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run build && vitest run --project unit --coverage
scripts.perf:smoke: pnpm run build && node scripts/run-k6-performance.mjs --profile smoke
scripts.perf:load: pnpm run build && node scripts/run-k6-performance.mjs --profile load
scripts.docs:generate: node scripts/generate-api-docs.mjs && pnpm run docs:commands:generate && pnpm run openapi:generate
scripts.docs:check: node scripts/check-docs-commands.mjs && node scripts/check-docs-package-parity.mjs && node scripts/check-architecture-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-adrs.mjs && node scripts/check-compatibility-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-powershell-doc-parity.mjs && pnpm run openapi:check
scripts.security: pnpm audit --audit-level high && node scripts/run-gitleaks.mjs && node scripts/check-reuse.mjs
scripts.verify:structure: node scripts/check-workspace-graph.mjs && node scripts/check-workspace-declarations.mjs && node scripts/check-public-surface.mjs && node scripts/check-command-surface.mjs && node scripts/check-release-config.mjs && node scripts/check-api-surfaces.mjs
scripts.gc: knip && node scripts/check-duplicates.mjs && node scripts/check-no-generated-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/check-docs-package-parity.mjs && node scripts/check-docs-commands.mjs && node scripts/check-public-surface.mjs && node scripts/check-release-config.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run test:mutation && pnpm run pack:dry-run && pnpm run schemas:check && pnpm run docs:build && pnpm run docs:check && pnpm run security && pnpm run ops:check && pnpm run verify:structure && pnpm run gc
scripts.ui:install:browsers: pnpm --dir apps/registry-ui exec playwright install --with-deps chromium
scripts.release:ready: pnpm --filter @a2amesh/cli run build && node packages/cli/bin/a2amesh.js release-check
scripts.check:pre-push: pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run pack:dry-run && pnpm run schemas:check && pnpm run docs:build && pnpm run docs:check && pnpm run security && pnpm run ops:check && pnpm run verify:structure && pnpm run gc
